name: Helio Governance
description: Routes OpenClaw tool calls and installs through Helio's policy sideband for allow/deny/approval/limit decisions and audit. Fail-closed: if Helio is unreachable, tool calls are blocked.

helioBaseUrl.description: Base URL of the Helio governance sideband.

tokenEnv.description: Name of the environment variable holding the adapter bearer token. Never the SDK token.

origin.description: Origin string reported to Helio for audit attribution.

evaluateTimeoutMs.description: Bounded timeout for POST /evaluate. On timeout the tool call fails closed (blocked).

evidence.description: Success-only evidence-extraction rules keyed by tool name. Each rule pulls a value from the tool's result and grounds it under an evidence key (which must be named by a Helio evidence.requires policy rule, or it is silently not stored).

key.description: evidence_key sent to POST /audit; must match a policy evidence.requires key.

path.description: Explicit segment path into event.result (e.g. ["url","host"]). Array form, not dotted, so keys containing '.' are unambiguous. A missing path skips the entry.

ttlSeconds.description: Optional TTL forwarded as ttl_seconds on the evidence entry.
